tasks.label: ✅  BUILD, COMMIT & PUSH
tasks.command: npm run build && git add . && git commit -m 'feat: atualizando componentes' && git push && notify-send 'VS Code' '✅ Build, Commit e Push realizados!' -i emblem-package-updated && paplay /usr/share/sounds/freedesktop/stereo/service-login.oga

tasks.label: ⬆️  RELEASE NPM
tasks.command: npm run build && git add . && git commit -m 'feat: atualizando componentes' && npm run release && notify-send 'VS Code' '🚀 Release enviado com sucesso!' -i emblem-package-updated
